description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect) Inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the enemy with the highest Speed for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color> while ignoring Resilience, and grants <color=#28d9ed>Pureblood's Dominion</color> to all allies at the start of battle. These effects cannot be removed.\n\n(Active Effect) Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)戦闘開始時、最もスピードが高い敵単体に効果抵抗を無視する<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。味方全体には<color=#28d9ed>鮮血の領域</color>を付与する。これらの効果は解除されない。\n\n(アクティブ効果)敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象に<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: (패시브 효과) 전투 시작 시 속도가 가장 빠른 적 한 명에게 대상의 효과 저항을 무시하고 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color>동안 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 부여합니다. 아군 전체에게는 <color=#28d9ed>선혈의 영역</color>을 부여합니다. 이 효과들은 해제되지 않습니다.\n\n(액티브 효과) 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
description.zh:
(被动效果) 战斗开始时,使速度最高的1名敌人无视目标的效果抵抗,并造成<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。使全体友军获得<color=#28d9ed>鲜血领域</color>效果。这些效果不会
被解除。

(主动效果) 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: When using this skill, removes <color=#28d9ed>2</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from all enemies, then attacks them. Deals increased damage and inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Reduced Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color> if the target is inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color>.
description.jp: スキル使用時、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2個</color>解除し、敵全体にダメージを与える。対象が<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状態の場合、ダメージがUPし、スキル使用後<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.kr: 스킬 사용 시 적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2개</color> 해제하고 적 전체를 공격합니다. 대상이 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color> 상태라면 피해가 증가하고 스킬 사용 후 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.zh: 使用技能时,解除全体敌人的<color=#28d9ed>2个</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>,并攻击全体敌人。若目标处于<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状态,则使伤害提升,且使用技能后<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。

name.jp: イプシロンの身体強化II

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> and <color=#28d9ed>damage</color> by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> and <color=#28d9ed>3%</color> respectively, when gaining a turn. (Max 10 stacks)
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\nターン開始時、自分の<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>、<color=#28d9ed>与えるダメージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>3%</color>UPする。\n(最大10回まで累積)
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n턴 획득 시, <color=#28d9ed>관통력, 피해량</color>이 <color=#28d9ed>5%, 3%</color> 증가합니다.(최대 10회 누적)
description.zh: (被动效果)\n获得回合时,<color=#28d9ed>穿透力、伤害量</color>分别提升<color=#28d9ed>5%,3%</color>。(最多可叠加10次)

description.en:
Becomes <color=#28d9ed>Enraged</color> when Health drops to <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> of Max Health or lower, then immediately uses <color=#28d9ed>Sword of Pure Blood</color>.

This attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict two <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> effects for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
Then grants all allies except for the caster irremovable increased <color=#28d9ed>Defense, Attack</color>, and <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>5 turns</color> while <color=#28d9ed>healing</color> by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.
description.jp:
最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>以下になると<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>状態に切り替わり、<color=#28d9ed>【鮮血の剣】</color>を直ちに発動する。

この攻撃は敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>2個を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
その後、自分を除く味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力、攻撃力、スピード</color>を<color=#28d9ed>5ターン</color>の間UPさせ、<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>回復させる。(解除不可)
description.kr:
최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 이하가 되면 <color=#28d9ed>광폭화</color> 상태로 전환하고, <color=#28d9ed>선혈의 검</color> 을 즉시 사용합니다.

이 공격은 전체 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상에게 2개의 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
이 후, 자신을 제외한 아군 전체에게 해제되지 않는 <color=#28d9ed>방어력, 공격력, 속도</color> 증가 효과를 <color=#28d9ed>5턴</color> 동안 부여하며 추가로 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 회복시킵니다.
description.zh:
若生命值降至上限的<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>以下,则转换为<color=#28d9ed>狂暴化</color>状态,并立即发动<color=#28d9ed>鲜血之剑</color>。

该攻击会攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对目标造成2个<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
此后,使除自身外全体友军获得无法被解除的<color=#28d9ed>防御力、攻击力、速度</color>提升效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>5回合</color>,并额外使<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>恢复<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。
